# Transient Simulation

**Summary**: A time-domain simulation used to model the dynamic behavior of the drill string and BHA.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] applied transient simulation to evaluate BHA designs and predict drilling motion.

## Key Results and Findings

- The transient simulation accurately predicted drilling motion, allowing for the optimization of BHA design and definition of a parameter roadmap. ([[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022, p. 15]])
